description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published releases. Run two parallel jobs: update-autorevision and update-archive, both on ubuntu-latest. The update-autorevision job checks out the master branch, generates an AutoRevision.txt file with git information, and creates a pull request with the changes. The update-archive job checks out the master branch, generates an AutoRevision.txt file, creates a build directory, and archives the repository as tar.gz and zip files, then uploads them as a release asset if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
